solved_issues.title: Common-scale quark RG validation
pass_fail_criteria: Validated common-scale u/t, c/t, d/b, s/b references must be available.
Mixed-scale PDG-style values cannot be used as a precision verdict.
evidence: Common-scale input validated: True.
Reference scale: M_Z = 91.1876 GeV.
Reference scheme: MSbar running quark masses at M_Z in SM convention.
Dressed c/t improves versus bare: True.
Warning-level dressed ratios: ('u/t',).
Precision quark matching remains warning-level because uncertainties are not propagated and u/t remains outside tolerance.
solved_issues.next_action: propagate common-scale uncertainties and investigate the remaining u/t tension without retuning

solved_issues.title: Gauge coupling precision lock
pass_fail_criteria: Use explicit electroweak matching convention.
All one-loop matching scales must lie in the electroweak window.
alpha_3 screen must remain within 1 percent.
evidence: alpha_3 relative error: 0.0026127869612162834.
one-loop matching scales in electroweak window: True.
Two-/three-loop threshold matching remains a separate precision extension, not a retuning step.
solved_issues.next_action: keep convention explicit and extend to higher-loop thresholds without retuning

remaining_blockers.title: Derive released Z_virt^{u,2}=1/2
pass_fail_criteria: Z=1/2 must follow from BHSM structure without c/t residual input.
If the half factor is only a two-state interpretation, it remains open.
evidence: Middle-up mode (6,0) is a pure-fiber j=0 up-sector mode.
Omega_u=6 identifies the channel but does not force the 1/2 amplitude.
Two-state virtual half-occupation is structurally plausible but not derived from the action.
remaining_blockers.next_action: derive the half-occupation/projection factor from the internal action or reject the released dressing promotion

remaining_blockers.title: Derive or reject CKM mixing exponent 1/16
pass_fail_criteria: 1/16 must follow independently from BHSM structure.
Residual improvement alone is not a derivation.
evidence: Candidate improves Vcb: True.
Candidate improves Vts: True.
Non-2-3 damage flag: False.
No independent 16-fold phase/covering/order derivation is present in the repo.
remaining_blockers.next_action: derive or reject the exponent before any official promotion

remaining_blockers.title: Boundary operator action derivation
pass_fail_criteria: Omega_l, Omega_u, Omega_d must follow from an action/spectral/boundary principle.
Recovery of the mode ledger alone is not enough.
evidence: Operational and action-linked scaffolds recover Omega_l=-q+2j=3.
Operational and action-linked scaffolds recover Omega_u=q-2j=6.
Operational and action-linked scaffolds recover Omega_d=q+4j=12.
A unique derivation from the complete internal action is not present on this branch.
remaining_blockers.next_action: derive the sector boundary functional from the complete internal action

remaining_blockers.title: Charged-lepton precision dressing
pass_fail_criteria: One fixed lepton-mode rule must improve mu/tau and e/tau.
Separate fitted electron and muon factors are forbidden.
evidence: Candidate rule: Z_l(k,j)=exp[-eta_l*(q^2+j^2)] with Hopf charge q=k-2j.
Fit input mu/tau relative error after dressing: 0.0.
Held-out e/tau relative error after dressing: 0.0035997951408065676.
The rule improves both rows but eta_l is fit from mu/tau and not independently derived.
Official frozen lepton predictions remain unchanged.
remaining_blockers.next_action: derive eta_l and charged-lepton scope independently before any official promotion

remaining_blockers.title: Scalar/Higgs/gap full proof
pass_fail_criteria: Full-spectrum proof or rigorous bound must exist.
Proxy/scaffold pass is not proof-level closure.
evidence: Scalar scaffold passes: True.
Dangerous light scalar count: 0.
Full action-level spectrum proof remains absent.
